title: pellaea scabra
intro: Pellaea scabra, also known as Rough Shield Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, characterized by its unique, leathery fronds. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Pellaea scabra include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pellaea scabra is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be found in various herbal supplements, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
